zh.Heilly, Amiens, Somme, Hauts-de-France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆阿米安斯
zh.Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France: 法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gautier III De Heilly於1137年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利時，他的父親Gauthier II De Heilly32歲，母親Gillette de Blois-Champagne57歲。他於1159年與Guilette de Navarre Countess of Champagne在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1189年享年52歲。

zh-hans.Heilly, Amiens, Somme, Hauts-de-France,: 法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆阿米安斯
zh-hans.Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France: 法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gautier III De Heilly于1137年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利时，他的父亲Gauthier II De Heilly32岁，母亲Gillette de Blois-Champagne57岁。他于1159年与Guilette de Navarre Countess of Champagne在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1189年享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heilly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of South German   Heinle  .

variants.name: Heinle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunther, Konrad, Otto.
South German: from a pet form of the personal name   Heinrich  .

nameMeanings.name: Gautier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gautier III De Heilly was born in 1137, in Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Gauthier II De Heilly, was 32 and his mother, Gillette de Blois-Champagne, was 57. He married Guilette de Navarre Countess of Champagne in 1159, in Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1189, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gautier III De Heilly est né en 1137, à Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Gauthier II De Heilly, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gillette de Blois-Champagne, avait 57 ans. Il a épousé Guilette de Navarre Countess of Champagne en 1159, à Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1189, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gautier III De Heilly 1137 in Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gauthier II De Heilly 32 und seine Mutter Gillette de Blois-Champagne 57. Er hat 1159 in Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Guilette de Navarre Countess of Champagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1189 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gautier III De Heilly è nato il nel 1137 nel Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Gauthier II De Heilly, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Gillette de Blois-Champagne, aveva 57 anni. Lui sposato Guilette de Navarre Countess of Champagne nel 1159, nel Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1189, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Heilly, Somme, Picardie, França: フランスピカーディソンメヘイリー

ja.Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメヘイリー
ja.Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメヘイリー
ja.lifeSummary: Gautier III De Heillyが1137年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメヘイリーで生まれた時，父Gauthier II De Heillyは32歳，母Gillette de Blois-Champagneは57歳であった。1159年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメヘイリーでGuilette de Navarre Countess of Champagneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1189年に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gautier III De Heilly(이)가 1137년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 헤이리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gauthier II De Heilly(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Gillette de Blois-Champagne(은)는 57세였다. 그는 1159년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 헤이리에서 Guilette de Navarre Countess of Champagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1189년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gautier III De Heilly nasceu em 1137, em Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Gauthier II De Heilly, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gillette de Blois-Champagne, tinha 57 anos. Ele casou-se com Guilette de Navarre Countess of Champagne em 1159, em Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1189, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gautier III De Heilly родился в 1137 г. в местности хилли, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Gauthier II De Heilly было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gillette de Blois-Champagne, 57. Он женился на женщине по имени Guilette de Navarre Countess of Champagne в 1159 г. в местности хилли, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1189 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gautier III De Heilly nació en 1137, en Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gauthier II De Heilly, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gillette de Blois-Champagne, tenía 57 años. Se casó con Guilette de Navarre Countess of Champagne en 1159, en Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1189, a la edad de 52 años.
